title: Monday.com Consultant / Specialist
excerpt: Hi - we’re a small startup and are looking for some Monday.com automation, configuration, etc help.  Can someone please recommend a firm to us?  Thanks, Brian

posts.author: brianwbates (Brian Bates)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - we’re a small startup and are looking for some Monday.com automation, configuration, etc help. Can someone please recommend a firm to us? Thanks, Brian

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, @brianwbates - You’ll find lots of help here, as many partners like ourselves contribute daily to the community. I’d love to learn more about your startup and what you are looking to achieve with monday․com. We are a product-certified partner with a small team of business automation experts, and every day we help others do more with monday․com. Please book a no-charge strategy session here so we can learn more about your business: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com

posts.author: OliverChrome (Oliver Crombach)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @brianwbates, we are mondays APAC partner of 2020 and help companies of all sizes configuring their monday.com platform towards their business needs. I am happy to jump on a call to scope out the different automation and configuration you envision. My email is oliver@jtscloud.com

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
We at Omnitas Consulting help teams all over the world to get started with monday.com all the the way from analys, design, and also helping with structuring the account as well as training.

We have been awarded best professional service partner 2019 and 2020 by monday.com themselves. With us you will always get the most honest consultation and we aim to solve your needs in the least expensive way possible. Our level of understanding and proficiency within the tool is not easily matched.

Please book me for an initial call where we talk about your needs in order for us to provide a proper quote: https://cal.mixmax.com/thomaskarlsson-305/video-45

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Brian,
This is something that is well within my area of expertise and I would be interested in hearing more on what you are wanting done.
You can reach me on andrewjohnson.56782@gmail.com
Best Wishes,
Andrew

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Brian - when you have a moment check out www.greenllamas.com. They can help you with all of your needs and add a very nice personal touch to all of their work. Highly recommend.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @brianwbates. We are one of the reliable monday partners backed by a pool of seasoned professionals having rich hands-on experience in monday com implementation, automation, configuration, etc. without disrupting your existing IT infrastructure. By partnering with us, you can unlock the potential of monday com to your business advantage.

posts.author: alicemgray (Alice Gray (Monday consulting))
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @brianwbates. When it comes to monday.com implementation, automation, and configuration, Damco Solutions is the most coveted choice among businesses of all sizes from Startups and ISVs to Fortune 2000 companies. Backed by a strong pool of monday consultants , we help you address all your project management challenges.

posts.author: jaseir (Jaseir)
posts.cookedHtml: Whether you need project management consulting, process assistance, or help with workflow automation and app integration, we’re (Jaseir) here to help you with your monday.com consultancy needs.

posts.author: ProcessMinded (John F)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking for some Monday.com help (re: project mgmt related / dependencies not working the way I want them to). I’m trying to leave Microsoft Project and I need some guidance on some things…Help!

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ProcessMinded

Welcome to the community!

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and recently awarded Professional Services Partner of the year, as well as being APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialize in integrations and custom requirements.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to meet with you and better understand your objectives - we can definitely assist with dependencies!

schedule a time with me here

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ProcessMinded ,

Lets connect and discuss the usecase.
